suggestions.topic: REST-SSZ Engine API decision: PR #764 vs #793
suggestions.rationale: Decision was explicitly deferred to ACDE Thursday (May 21). This is a blocking technical decision affecting client implementation strategy, and ACDT needs to align on the outcome or confirm implementation status.

suggestions.topic: bal-devnet-7 launch status and test results
suggestions.rationale: Devnet was targeting May 18-19 launch with tests-bal@v7.2.0 as a gate. Multiple clients were still pending (Besu missing tests, Geth mid-week). Need confirmation of launch success and client participation.

suggestions.topic: State access optimization progress and benchmarking for final repricing
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #80 emphasized urgency: client teams must report optimization status (batch I/O, state root calculation) as a blocker for final EIP-8038/2780 repricing numbers. This directly gates glamsterdam-devnet-5 scope.

suggestions.topic: glamsterdam-devnet-4 readiness with engine API gas limit changes
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-4 requires separate client branches due to engine API PR #796 (gas limit coordination for ePBS). Nethermind and Erigon completed; other clients' status unclear. Need launch timeline confirmation.

suggestions.topic: Builder deposit spam mitigation: testing results and ACDC cost analysis
suggestions.rationale: PR 5223 (8192 epoch delay) was deferred pending signature verification benchmarks and cost analysis presentation at ACDC. Justin Traglia was tasked with presenting findings; need update on economic viability and alternative approaches.

suggestions.topic: EPBS sync security implications and Prysm/Teku issues
suggestions.rationale: Multiple meetings discussed ePBS range sync without payload envelopes. ACDT #79 reported Prysm peer downscoring and Teku envelope problems preventing glamsterdam-devnet-3 recovery. EL teams were analyzing security implications but no resolution reported.

Devnet-5 is targeted to include EIP-8038, EIP-2780, EIP-8246, and EIP-7954 with placeholder numbers pending benchmarks. Need to confirm which EIPs are ready and set realistic launch timeline based on benchmark completion.
Mandatory for bal-devnet-7 launch (May 18-19). Felix/client teams were tasked with review and merge. Likely resolved async but worth confirming to close the loop.
